ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the document (e.g., PDF, Word) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., current, archived) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the document belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the document is accessible to the public */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., PDF, Word) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format is the default format for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., current, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being downloaded */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format being downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the document was downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the document */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being purchased */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the document was purchased */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who purchased the document */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, lawyer, public) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being compared */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison result */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the result belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the result belongs to */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes between the versions */,
  "detailed_changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes between the versions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecommerce" (
  "ecommerce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each e-commerce platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the e-commerce platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the e-commerce platform */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the e-commerce platform was added */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the e-commerce platform was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecommerce_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase the payment belongs to */,
  "ecommerce_id" INTEGER /* ID of the e-commerce platform the payment was made through */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the e-commerce platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ecommerce_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecommerce_id") REFERENCES ecommerce ("ecommerce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the analytics data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the document was accessed */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the document was purchased */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the document */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the document */,
  "purchases" INTEGER /* Number of purchases of the document */,
  "total_accesses" INTEGER /* Total number of accesses (views + downloads) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for personalized analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the subscription belongs to */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the subscription belongs to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "doc_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document category */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the category was assigned to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_categories_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
